title: Eugnostos the Blessed: The Structure of the Divine
source: Nag Hammadi Codex III and V
description: A philosophical treatise on the structure of the divine realm — the Unbegotten Father, the Self-Generated, and their emanations.
introduction: A philosophical treatise on the structure of the divine realm — the Unbegotten Father, the Self-Generated, and their emanations.

translation.text: The one who exists before all things is called the Unbegotten Father. He contemplated himself in the light that surrounds him.
